changelog.note: Initial graph persisted from planning session (Node/TS, Docker, mixed auth, artifacts + cover PDF, urgent webhooks).

nodes.label: Unattended overnight execution
nodes.description: Pipeline runs start-to-finish without human intervention, recovering from transient errors.

nodes.label: Coverage across many job boards
nodes.description: Aggregate listings from public ATSes and auth-walled platforms in a single run.

nodes.label: Only act on relevant jobs
nodes.description: Avoid wasting LLM tokens and PDF generation on jobs that don't match the user profile.

nodes.label: Testable without live sites
nodes.description: Scraper logic must be exercisable in CI / locally without hitting real job boards.

nodes.label: Human submits final application
nodes.description: Pipeline produces artifacts; user does the final review + submission. No auto-apply.

nodes.label: Cross-run deduplication
nodes.description: DB must not store duplicate listings across pipeline runs.

nodes.label: Full error recovery
nodes.description: A failure in one adapter, one listing, or one resume must not abort the whole run.

nodes.label: Tailored resume PDF per job
nodes.description: Each relevant job gets a uniquely tailored, formatted PDF resume.

nodes.label: Tailored cover letter PDF per job
nodes.description: Each relevant job also gets a tailored cover letter PDF rendered with the same style as the resume.

nodes.label: Profile-based relevance filter
nodes.description: Filter listings against skills, seniority, and role preferences before generation.

nodes.label: Offline scraper test harness
nodes.description: Tests use saved HTML/JSON fixtures, never hit live sites.

nodes.label: Handle dynamic page loads
nodes.description: Adapters must wait for client-rendered content (infinite scroll, lazy-loaded cards).

nodes.label: Run outcome observable
nodes.description: Every run produces a structured summary that reaches the user without them checking logs.

nodes.label: Urgent alerts mid-run
nodes.description: High-severity events (session expiry, sustained LLM outage) fire an immediate webhook, not just the end-of-run summary.

nodes.label: Generated documents must not fabricate experience
nodes.description: LLM may rewrite/reorder/emphasise but must never introduce skills, employers, dates, or accomplishments not in the master profile. Applies to both resume and cover letter.

nodes.label: Per-job artifact folder
nodes.description: Each generated job produces a deterministic folder layout: resume.pdf, cover_letter.pdf, listing.json, prompt.md, generation_meta.json, apply_url.txt.

nodes.label: Crash-resumable run
nodes.description: If the container is killed mid-run, the next invocation can resume without redoing completed stages.

nodes.label: Configurable boards and limits
nodes.description: Board list, per-board listing caps, per-night resume cap, and concurrency are all config-driven, not hardcoded.

nodes.label: Node.js + TypeScript runtime
nodes.description: Whole pipeline written in TypeScript on Node.
nodes.rationale: User-selected. Strong Playwright + LLM SDK ecosystem; single-language stack from scraping through PDF generation; first-class async for I/O-bound work.

nodes.label: Playwright for browser automation
nodes.description: Playwright (Chromium) for all rendered-page scraping with persistent BrowserContext for session reuse.
nodes.rationale: Built-in storageState, robust auto-waits, network interception, multi-browser, better stealth posture than Selenium.

nodes.label: Hosted LLM API for generation
nodes.description: Hosted model (OpenAI/Anthropic) drives both resume and cover letter generation in JSON mode/structured output.
nodes.rationale: User-selected. Higher tailoring quality vs local models; structured-output / JSON mode available; one provider for both documents.

nodes.label: Mixed auth strategy
nodes.description: Persisted sessions for LinkedIn/Wellfound; unauthenticated for public ATSes (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, public LinkedIn job search, public company pages).
nodes.rationale: User-selected. Avoids automated login on protected sites.

nodes.label: Manual login -> persisted storageState
nodes.description: One-shot login CLI opens headed Chromium, user logs in, storageState JSON saved per site; pipeline reuses it.
nodes.rationale: Sidesteps 2FA/captcha automation; refreshable on demand.
alternatives_considered: Cookie import from real browser profile

nodes.label: Session expiry: skip + urgent alert + continue
nodes.description: On detecting login redirect/401/captcha page: mark adapter needs_relogin in DB, fire urgent webhook immediately, continue rest of pipeline. Future runs auto-skip the adapter until login is re-run.
nodes.rationale: User-selected. Maximises overnight yield while giving an actionable signal in time to re-auth.

nodes.label: Per-site adapter pattern
nodes.description: Each board has its own adapter conforming to a common ScraperAdapter interface. Adapters are responsible for SessionExpired detection (login URL substring, captcha selector).
nodes.rationale: Per-source isolation; one broken adapter cannot fail the run; enables fixture-based testing.

nodes.label: Docker container deployment
nodes.description: Pipeline ships as a Docker image based on mcr.microsoft.com/playwright; volumes mount db/, sessions/, outputs/, fixtures/, config/, profile/.
nodes.rationale: Reproducible Playwright environment; isolates from host Node version; easy to relocate.

nodes.label: Host launchd triggers one-shot container
nodes.description: macOS launchd job runs docker compose run --rm pipeline nightly. Container exits at end of run.
nodes.rationale: No long-running daemon; logs captured per invocation; restart-on-failure handled by launchd.

nodes.label: Webhook notification (Slack/Discord)
nodes.description: End-of-run summary AND urgent mid-run alerts posted to a webhook URL.
nodes.rationale: Push-based; no SMTP setup; addresses silent-failure risk; supports both summary and urgent posts.

nodes.label: JSON Resume schema as canonical profile
nodes.description: Master resume + extension fields (x_preferences) stored as a single JSON Resume document.
nodes.rationale: Open standard, large theme ecosystem, easy to validate, schema documents itself.

nodes.label: One-shot LLM-assisted PDF -> JSON Resume bootstrap
nodes.description: Separate bootstrap CLI extracts text from user's PDF/DOCX, prompts the LLM to emit JSON Resume, opens in $EDITOR for manual review/edit before commit.
nodes.rationale: User has no structured source today; one-time cost; manual review prevents bad data.

nodes.label: PDF via Handlebars HTML + Playwright print
nodes.description: Both resume and cover letter rendered through Handlebars templates, printed by Chromium (Playwright page.pdf). Same renderer, different templates.
nodes.rationale: Reuses Playwright; full CSS control; deterministic; one renderer for two doc types.

nodes.label: Cover letter rendered to PDF alongside resume
nodes.description: Per-job artifact folder always includes both resume.pdf and cover_letter.pdf (same renderer, same grounding rules).
nodes.rationale: User-selected. Ready-to-upload; consistent styling; one extra LLM call per job.

nodes.label: SQLite via better-sqlite3 + Drizzle ORM
nodes.description: Embedded SQLite on a Docker volume; Drizzle for typed schema and migrations.
nodes.rationale: Single-machine, single-writer; zero ops; survives container restarts via volume; Drizzle gives TS types and migrations.

nodes.label: Multi-key dedup fingerprint
nodes.description: Primary: (source, source_id). Secondary: SHA256(normalised company+title+normalised_url). Tertiary: SHA256(normalised description).
nodes.rationale: Same job often appears on multiple boards under different IDs; URL/title alone misses re-posts.

nodes.label: LLM operates in grounded mode only
nodes.description: LLM receives master resume + JD; must reorder/select bullets, rewrite phrasing, emphasise matching skills. May NOT introduce new employers, dates, titles, or skills. Output validated against whitelist from master profile; one regeneration on failure; second failure rejects job. Applies to cover letter too.
nodes.rationale: Eliminates fabrication risk user cannot catch overnight.

nodes.label: Artifacts only, no auto-apply
nodes.description: Pipeline ends at a per-job folder. User reviews + submits manually next morning.
nodes.rationale: User-selected. Eliminates per-board form automation and largest ToS/legal risk surface.

nodes.label: Per-stage retry + per-adapter circuit breaker
nodes.description: Each unit of work has bounded retry with exponential backoff and jitter. Per-adapter circuit breaker trips after N consecutive failures and skips remainder.
nodes.rationale: Most failures are transient. Circuit breaker prevents wasting overnight time on a hard-broken adapter.

nodes.label: Checkpoint progress in DB
nodes.description: Each stage records completion in SQLite. Re-running with --resume continues after the last completed stage.
nodes.rationale: Container restart should not redo work; supports req_resumable_run.

nodes.label: Bounded cross-board concurrency, serial within board
nodes.description: Adapters run concurrently with a configurable pool (default 3). Within an adapter, requests are serial with randomized delay (default 1.5-4s) and a per-board listing cap.
nodes.rationale: Maximises wall-clock throughput while staying polite per origin; reduces bot-detection signal.

nodes.label: Three test layers: unit / conformance / integration
nodes.description: (1) Per-adapter unit tests against saved HTML fixtures. (2) Conformance test that every registered adapter satisfies ScraperAdapter and produces schema-valid Job. (3) Orchestrator integration test with mock adapters + mock LLM + temp SQLite.
nodes.rationale: Layered coverage with no live-site dependence.

nodes.label: Pipeline orchestrator
nodes.description: Top-level run loop: scrape -> ingest/dedup -> filter -> generate -> notify. Owns error boundaries, retry policy, and checkpointing.

nodes.label: Scraper engine + adapter registry
nodes.description: Manages Playwright contexts, applies stealth tweaks, dispatches per-site adapters, normalises results.

nodes.label: Session storage state manager
nodes.description: Loads/saves Playwright storageState JSON per site; flags expired sessions; emits SessionExpiredError; tracks needs_relogin.

nodes.label: Persistent listings database
nodes.description: SQLite + Drizzle schema: runs, jobs, fingerprints, generations, errors, adapter_health.

nodes.label: Relevance filter
nodes.description: Scores listings against the user profile; records reason on reject.

nodes.label: Resume tailoring
nodes.description: Calls grounded LLM to rewrite resume sections, validates against master, then renders PDF.

nodes.label: Cover letter tailoring
nodes.description: Calls grounded LLM to draft a per-job cover letter, validates against master, then renders PDF.

nodes.label: HTML -> PDF renderer
nodes.description: Renders Handlebars templates for resume and cover letter; prints via Playwright page.pdf.

nodes.label: LLM API client
nodes.description: Hosted-LLM SDK wrapper with retry, JSON-mode validation, cost tracking, and offline mock implementation for tests.

nodes.label: Webhook notifier
nodes.description: Posts run summary AND urgent mid-run alerts to Slack/Discord webhook. Always invoked in a finally block by the orchestrator.

nodes.label: Fixture-based test harness
nodes.description: Loads saved HTML pages and intercepts Playwright network responses (page.route); provides mock LLM client and fixture-recording CLI.

nodes.label: Profile bootstrap CLI
nodes.description: One-shot: PDF/DOCX -> text -> LLM -> JSON Resume draft -> opens in $EDITOR -> commits.

nodes.label: Docker image + compose
nodes.description: Dockerfile based on mcr.microsoft.com/playwright; compose mounts ./data and ./config and ./profile.

nodes.label: Per-job artifact writer
nodes.description: Composes resume_gen + cover_letter_gen output and writes per-job output folders.

nodes.label: Retry + circuit breaker utility
nodes.description: Cross-cutting helper providing bounded exponential backoff + per-key circuit breaker; wraps adapter and LLM calls.

nodes.label: Structured logger
nodes.description: JSON logger keyed on run_id, adapter_id, job_id; stdout + per-run log file under outputs/.

nodes.label: Normalised job listing schema
nodes.description: Common shape every adapter must return.
nodes.contract: { source, source_id, url, title, company, location, remote, posted_at, scraped_at, description_html, description_text, salary?, seniority?, raw }

nodes.label: ScraperAdapter contract
nodes.description: Each adapter exposes id, requiresAuth, list(query, ctx), enrich(listing, ctx).
nodes.contract: interface ScraperAdapter { id: string; requiresAuth: boolean; list(q, ctx): AsyncIterable<RawListing>; enrich?(l, ctx): Promise<RawListing>; detectSessionExpired?(page): Promise<boolean>; }

nodes.label: User profile schema
nodes.description: JSON Resume v1 + extension block.
nodes.contract: { ...JSONResume, x_preferences: { target_roles[], seniority, locations[], remote_pref, exclude_keywords[], min_salary? } }

nodes.label: DB repository
nodes.description: Typed CRUD + dedup queries.
nodes.contract: interface JobsRepo { upsertJob(j): {id, isNew}; markStage(jobId, stage); listForRun(runId, stage); markAdapterNeedsRelogin(id); ... }

nodes.label: Document render input
nodes.description: Input to the PDF renderer (used by both resume and cover letter).
nodes.contract: { docType: 'resume' | 'cover_letter', payload: object, jobMeta: { title, company, jobId }, themeId: string } -> Buffer (PDF)

nodes.label: Run summary
nodes.description: Structured summary posted to webhook.
nodes.contract: { runId, startedAt, finishedAt, perAdapter: [...], filteredIn, generated, failures: [...], sessionsExpired: string[] }

nodes.label: Urgent alert
nodes.description: Mid-run urgent webhook payload.
nodes.contract: { runId, severity: 'urgent', kind: 'session_expired' | 'llm_outage', adapterId?, message, timestamp }

nodes.label: Persisted sessions survive between nights
nodes.description: LinkedIn/Wellfound storageState remains valid across days, not just one overnight run.

nodes.label: Sessions won't trigger captcha mid-run
nodes.description: Warmed-up sessions can paginate through results without an interactive challenge.

nodes.label: User accepts ToS risk of session reuse
nodes.description: LinkedIn ToS forbids automated access; user is OK with risk to their account.

nodes.label: Site DOMs stable enough for weeks
nodes.description: Adapters won't need patching more than every few weeks.

nodes.label: Per-night LLM cost is acceptable
nodes.description: Generating ~15-40 tailored resumes + cover letters per night fits a reasonable cost ceiling.

nodes.label: PDF parses correctly into JSON Resume
nodes.description: LLM-assisted bootstrap captures the user's PDF resume accurately enough for one-time manual review.

nodes.label: HTML template renders consistently to PDF
nodes.description: Chosen Handlebars templates print reliably under headless Chromium across content lengths.

nodes.label: Playwright Docker image works on user's Mac
nodes.description: Microsoft Playwright base image supports the user's host arch (esp. Apple Silicon) without browser-launch issues.

nodes.label: Whitelist captures all valid claims
nodes.description: Tokenising the master profile into companies/dates/skills/titles is sufficient to catch fabricated content without too many false positives.

nodes.label: Bot detection breaks scraping silently
nodes.description: A site update can shadow-ban or serve fake/empty content without throwing errors.

nodes.label: Session invalidated overnight
nodes.description: Auth-walled site logs the session out; pipeline can't recover unattended.

nodes.label: Personal account restricted/banned
nodes.description: Repeated automated access could trigger account-level enforcement.

nodes.label: Adapter silently produces wrong fields
nodes.description: Site markup changes; adapter still succeeds but with wrong data.

nodes.label: LLM API outage or throttling
nodes.description: Hosted LLM rate-limits or returns 5xx mid-run; resumes fail to generate.

nodes.label: Silent overnight failure
nodes.description: Pipeline crashes or no-ops; user wakes up to nothing with no signal.

nodes.label: LLM fabricates document content
nodes.description: LLM invents employers/dates/skills the user doesn't have; user submits without catching it.

nodes.label: Dedup fingerprint misses cross-board re-posts
nodes.description: Same role on multiple boards with different IDs/URLs is counted as N distinct jobs.

nodes.label: Run exceeds overnight window
nodes.description: Total wall-clock time pushes past morning; partial output.

nodes.label: Grounding validator over-rejects
nodes.description: Whitelist false-positives cause many jobs to be rejected after two LLM attempts; low yield.

nodes.label: Per-adapter HTML-fixture unit tests
nodes.description: Each adapter has tests/fixtures/<adapter>/ with saved listing pages; tests load each fixture, run the adapter parser, assert exact normalised-Job output.

nodes.label: Adapter conformance suite
nodes.description: Loops every registered adapter, runs against fixtures, validates output against the Job JSON Schema.

nodes.label: Orchestrator integration with mocks
nodes.description: Runs full pipeline with mock adapters, mock LLM, temp SQLite. Asserts dedup, filter, generation, artifact write, notification.

nodes.label: Grounding validator tests
nodes.description: Tests the validator rejects LLM outputs containing employers/dates/skills/titles not in the master profile. Includes adversarial fixtures.

nodes.label: Cover letter grounding tests
nodes.description: Same grounding validator applied to cover letter outputs; adversarial fixtures included.

nodes.label: Dedup fingerprint property tests
nodes.description: Property-based: variations of same listing collapse to same fingerprint; genuinely different listings don't.

nodes.label: Notifier-always-fires test
nodes.description: Integration test: orchestrator with all stages forced to throw still invokes the notifier exactly once with a failure summary.

nodes.label: Session-expired urgent-alert test
nodes.description: Adapter under fixture login-redirect raises SessionExpiredError; orchestrator marks adapter, fires urgent webhook, continues.

nodes.label: PDF snapshot tests
nodes.description: Rendering known JSON Resume + cover letter inputs produces PDFs whose extracted text matches snapshots.
